content.en:
"Respected half-step extradimensional realm guest, what do you need?"

An employee of the Garan Chamber of Commerce said respectfully.

For the Garan Chamber of Commerce, any half-step extradimensional realm is worthy of respect, and it is also their big customer, so it seems to be very respectful.

"Does the Garan Chamber of Commerce have such resources that are better than the Immortal Golden Pulp~?"

Ye Tian asked.

Golden Marrow of Immortality!

This employee was shocked, the Immortal Golden Marrow was already a very good resource, which helped to refine the power of the Transcendent Dimension, it was enough for those powerhouses of the Half-Step Transcendent Realm, and it was a ten-level resource.

Such a resource that is better than the golden pith of immortality, he really can't think of it.

"Dear guest, I don't know much, I need to ask the above for advice. "

The employee said.

"Okay, then I'll wait here. "

Ye Tian said.

......

Soon after, the employee returned.

"Honorable guests, our Garan Chamber of Commerce does have resources beyond the Immortal Golden Essence, but they are not currently for sale. "

The employee said with a hint of apology.

Not for sale?

Ye Tian frowned, but it was normal to think about it carefully.

That kind of extradimensional resources must be very rare and rare, and even the Garan Chamber of Commerce may not be enough, so naturally they will not be taken out for sale.

The resources that can be taken out for sale are almost all relatively common and large quantities, or they are resources taken out to attract customers.

Just when Ye Tian was disappointed, the employee said: "Dear guests, although our Jialan Chamber of Commerce does not sell that kind of resource, there will be a big auction soon, and there will be this kind of resource in the auction!"

As he spoke, the employee took out an invitation letter, which was also given to him by the Garan Chamber of Commerce.

"Garan Chamber of Commerce, Extreme Yang Realm Auction!"

Ye Tian put away the auction invitation and left.

According to the time on the invitation, the auction is scheduled to be after the one percent extradimensional era, which is not a long time.

Therefore, Ye Tian just waited quietly.

In the blink of an eye, one percent of the extradimensional era time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the auction venue of the Extreme Yang Realm of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce.

"There are a lot of half-step extradimensional realms, and there are even a few extradimensional realms!"

Ye Tian even sensed that the aura of some half-step extradimensional realms was extremely terrifying, and it seemed that he could step into the extradimensional realm at any time, but it seemed that he had not broken through for some reason.

At this moment, he knew that he was far from being invincible in the half-step extradimensional realm, and he could still have the strength of the half-step superdimensional power to crush him.

"These half-step transcendental realm bodies should be able to transform into transcendental bodies at any time, and even the superdimensional power has been tempered to the consummation realm!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

For many half-step extradimensional realms with backgrounds, as long as the extradimensional heart domain is opened up and there are sufficient resources, the superdimensional power can be tempered to the small success, large completion or even consummation realm, and the process of refining the superdimensional power is not difficult.

For the half-step transcendental realm, the difficulty is only to open up the extradimensional heart domain, but after the opening is successful, the follow-up cultivation will be easy.

Therefore, it is not uncommon to refine the power of the extradimensional to the half-step transcendent realm of perfection.

Soon.

The half-step transcendent realm sat on the thrones of the auction hall.

The minimum cultivation that can be qualified to enter here is a half-step transcendent realm, and the peak realm god is not qualified to enter at all.

Time passed slowly.

I don't know how long it has been, but the auction is finally about to begin.

A half-step extradimensional realm auctioneer from the Garan Chamber of Commerce came out.

"Distinguished guests, I am the auctioneer of this auction, Dovestar, and I am in charge of this auction, and as usual, the auction will be made in the sole currency of Galanbao......"

The dove star god said a lot, and then announced that the auction had begun. []

Since the lowest cultivation level participating in the auction is a half-step extra-dimensional realm, the auction items are of extremely high grade, and they are all treasures that are useful for a half-step extra-dimensional realm or even a transcendent realm.

Of course, occasionally there will be some treasures that will help the peak realm gods, such as the treasures that help the peak realm gods comprehend the power of the super dimension, this kind of treasure is extremely valuable, even the super dimensional realm will be excited.

After all, if you can help a peak realm god successfully comprehend the power of the super-dimensional, and without transformation, you can become a super-dimensional realm in the future, which is equivalent to cultivating a future extra-dimensional realm!

0 begging for flowers

Any force wants to cultivate a superdimensional realm, and in that case, it will be enough to make the strength of the force where it is located skyrocket.

It's a pity that such resources are so rare that even the Garan Chamber of Commerce doesn't have much.

At the beginning, most of the auction items were some super-dimensional secret treasures, high-level super-dimensional things, etc., although the value was not low, but Ye Tian obviously didn't like it, so he didn't participate in the bidding.

Subsequently, there are some resources that help to refine the power of the superdimension, but the grade is similar to the immortal golden pice, or even inferior to the immortal golden pice, and the only advantage is that the amount is large.

However, this kind of resource was of no use to Ye Tian, so he naturally couldn't look down on it.

Suddenly.

The sale of an auction item has attracted the attention of many half-step extradimensional realms.

Rumble!!!

A powerful extradimensional spirit emerged, but was trapped in it by a super-dimensional secret orb.

"A living extra-dimensional elf, whose strength is equivalent to a half-step super-dimensional realm, is very valuable!"

Many half-step extradimensional realms were moved.

Such a superdimensional elf helps the pinnacle realm god to comprehend the superdimensional power, although it may not be able to realize the superdimensional power, but as long as there is a little hope, it is worth bidding.

"The half-step extradimensional elf of the super-dimensional realm, the starting price is 300 million!"

The Dove Star Realm God announced.

300 million Gala Treasure Coins, this price makes the ordinary half-step extradimensional realm prohibitive, and it is not qualified to bid at all!

However, for the half-step extradimensional realm of some powerful extradimensional forces, I really don't think it's much.

"350 million Galanbao Coins!"

"400 million Gala Treasure Coins!"

"600 million Galanbol Coins!"

These half-step extradimensional realms were frantically bidding, as if those Gala Treasure Coins were just a number.

"It's a pity that I've already comprehended the power of extradimensionality, otherwise I would really want to bid for it. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Moreover, he is still in the 6,000 Territory, and it is not easy to return to the 7,362 Territory, otherwise, he will also spend a lot of money to bid for his relatives to comprehend the power of the extradimensionality.

For now, forget it, wait for the right time, maybe you can bring back a better treasure.
